feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Write off receivables reason code 200
entry.content:
How to use reason code other than 200 for write-offs in the App Write off Receivables.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4 Hana Cloud 特殊总账标识W 如何使用
entry.content:
情境描述：未启用汇票功能，但希望可以透过过账收款／过账付款／结清收款／结清付款 使用特殊总账标识W或S将应付账款／应收账款 转为 应付票据／应收票据。

首先，在自动科目决定下可以设定特殊总账标识S & W 对应的科目

但是在 过账收款／过账付款／结清收款／结清付款 中却被限制无法选择特殊总账标识S或W

请问在不使用标准的汇票功能下，可以如何解决此问题呢？

再请专家协助，谢谢。

entry.title: #COE#BUMA
entry.content: Monitor email transmission app is not showing mails which were sent on 29.05.2024, is there a retention period for email transmissions? If yes, where can we view or configure this?

entry.title: SSCUI 103601 is not available for our system
entry.content:
Hi. I need your help for this.

We are looking for the SSCUI 103601 [Change Message Control for Duplicate Tax Numbers] .

I tried to look for main scope item of 103601 in the file "Configuration Activity.xlsm (SAP Customer)" which can be downloaded in Roadmap viewer.
But it is empty.
What scope item should be activated for using sscui 103601?
Thank you in advance

entry.title: About KeepAlive settings in S4HC
entry.content:
Hi Exparts,

Are the validity and validity period of KeepAlive published on the web server of the API destination in S4HC?
API destination:https://myXXXXXX-api.s4hana.cloud.sap

Best Regards,
Kyosuke

entry.title: Calibration process in QM module in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Please advise whether Calibration process is available in QM module in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.  

If not available in 2402, please advise whether any plans are there to include this 2408 S/4HANA public cloud edition. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: aATP ABC with quantity conversion
entry.content:
Dear reader,

We are using aATP alternative based confirmation and we are using the quantity conversion within the ABC logic

2 PC of material A can be replaced by 1 PC of material B vice versa.

This means that when a customer is ordering 2 PC of material A and there is only 1 PC in stock of this material, the ABC logic is telling that 1/2 PC of B should also be delivered. The Unit of Measure PC is not allowing decimals, however based on the ATP check, decimals are appearing within the sales order.

How can we prevent that the result of an ATP check is resulting in decimals for the UoM PC.

We are not using any alternative UoM in sales orders.

Regards,

Hans van Essen

entry.title: Equivalent APP on SAP Hana cloud Public of transaction VFP1
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we would like to ask if exist an equivalent APP of transaction VFP1 on SAP Hana Cloud Public.

We need to set in VFP1 the date for our invoice so whatever date we maintain, irrespective of Actual GI Date, our invoice date will be the date from VFP1.

In SAP Cloud Public what mode can we use to implement this?

Thank you

entry.title: Requesting Sample Code for Creating Asset Master via SAP SOAP API
entry.content:
Hello Cummunity!

Fixed Asset - Create Main Asset (Asynchronous)

https://api.sap.com/api/FIXEDASSETCREATEMAIN/overview

I would like to test creating an asset master in the Soap API. Could you provide sample code that I can use for testing?

I input it as shown below, but I keep getting an error.

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:fi="http://sap.com/xi/FI-AA">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<fi:FixedAssetCreateMainBulkRequestMessage>
<MessageHeader>
<CreationDateTime>2024-07-11T09:43:36.115129Z</CreationDateTime>
</MessageHeader>
<FixedAssetMainRequest>
<MessageHeader>
<CreationDateTime>2024-07-11T09:43:36.115129Z</CreationDateTime>
</MessageHeader>
<FixedAsset>
<CompanyCode>1000</CompanyCode>
<AssetClass>Z1000</AssetClass>
<General>
<FixedAssetDescription>TSLA_MY</FixedAssetDescription>
<BaseUnit>EA</BaseUnit>
</General>
<AccountAssignment>
<CostCenter>0000101010</CostCenter>
</AccountAssignment>

</FixedAsset>
</FixedAssetMainRequest>
</fi:FixedAssetCreateMainBulkRequestMessage>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

 

Error message:

<faultstring xml:lang="en">Web service processing error; more details in the web service error log on provider side (UTC timestamp 20240712034028; Transaction ID 289C80F191F901C0E0066909E1A3FFFA)</faultstring>

I would appreciate your help.

Huny

entry.title: Requesting Sample Code for Creating Asset Master via SAP SOAP API
entry.content:
Hello Cummunity!

Fixed Asset - Create Main Asset (Asynchronous)

https://api.sap.com/api/FIXEDASSETCREATEMAIN/overview

I would like to test creating an asset master in the Soap API. Could you provide sample code that I can use for testing?

I input it as shown below, but I keep getting an error.

Error message:

I would appreciate your help.

Huny

entry.title: Problem to change or assign payee of supplier documents S/4Hana Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello Cummunity,

Currently in S/4hana Onpremise, when we need to change or assign a payee or alternative payer of a document already registered, we enter transaction FB02, search for the document and it shows us the payee field. But now I need the same process in S/4Hana Cloud Public, and to make the changes we enter the Manage Journal Entry and this Payee field is not shown.

Could you please help me to identify why the field is not shown, or if it should be done in another application.

Thank you in advance for your answer!

entry.title: How to rebuild the house bank data on the accounting documents
entry.content:
Cash flows from the accounting document are wrongly showing under a bank account. It should be under a bank account unassigned as the house bank is not assigned to the accounting doucment.

 

The G/L Account of the cash flow is a balance sheet account assigned to the house bank data.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: [S4HC] Replacement of Customized Email Trigger : function : so_new_document_send_api1
entry.content:
Dear, Experts

Hello,

       I have a requirement to send an email alert in my customized app. Are there any alternatives of FM : so_new_document_send_api1 which released for using in S4HC ( Public Edition )?

       I have already researched in community and documentation, but most of them are triggered from Standard Application via Output Determination and Control in S4HC.

Thank you.

entry.title: Email Triggering for Maintenace Notification in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have a requirement for email triggering functionality to work center responsible person whenever a maintenance notification is created. 

can this be achieved in standard?

Thanks!

entry.title: Email Triggering for Preventive Maintenace Order(On call date) in SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to trigger email notification for preventive maintenance order on call date in S4 Hana public cloud version. 

Can this functionality be achieved in standard?

Thanks

How to change the credit limit and the credit limit validity date.

entry.title: S/4 Hana Cloud Public - Invoice Bloking
entry.content:
Hi Sap Experts, 

I need your help on how to block all incoming supplier invoices. (Via MM or direct to FI)

We cannot block payment conditions and we also do not want to block all suppliers.

I did the configuration below, but it didn't work.

Thanks

entry.title: S4HC CDS view on Supplier that I can filter on Industry
entry.content:
We are on S4HC Public Cloud.

The "Manage Supplier Master screen" for some of our suppliers has had Industries maintained.   I need a CDS view on Supplier that I can filter on Industry.  I have checked I_Supplier and created a custom CDS view of it and although this has Industry on a number of elements none of them show the values that can be seen in the "Manage Supplier Master screen".

I reason that we need this custom CDS view is that we want to expose via API, data that is associated with particular industry Suppliers.

See the Manage Suppler Master screen

And into the details of that Supplier – notice that the Industries are set to 10 and 21.

I had created a custom CDS view that is looking at I_SUPPLIERS and there does not appear to be any element that corresponds to the above Industries.   There are ½ dozen other Industry elements but these are all blank.

Another screen access via the Supplier List shows a Industry but there no way to edit this – even if there was I would not know if I could use that information in a CDS view anyway.

entry.title: Change bank account opening date.
entry.content:
For our implementation project, we have a requirement that the field Bank Account Opening Date (VALID_FROM) should be possible to be changed.

The status for this field is locked for changes in the configuration


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Cycle Count IM
entry.content:
Hi,

We are implementing Cycle count process using IM (don't have EWM). We assigned CC Inv Code (A.B C) to all materials. Now when we schedule print Count documents (for the first time) it prints all active materials. It is not possible to cycle count all active parts, our question is what is the best practice for implementing Cycle Count in the middle of the year? Our understating is that because we never cycle counted before therefore system is
selecting all materials for counting, but its not possible to count all. 
Thanks in advance for any comments / suggestion.
Ashraf

S/4HANA Public Cloud 2402
